content.fact_text: A centralized, production-ready logging module implemented with Pino, featuring automatic PII redaction and structured, asynchronous JSON output.

provenance_data.behaviour: Initializes a structured JSON logging service using Pino, configured for PII redaction and hierarchical context, ready for integration into the catalog and inventory management system.
interfaces: export interface LogContext { module: string; requestId?: string; userId?: string; sku?: string; batchProcessId?: string; [key: string]: any; }
provenance_data.utility: Provides a consistent, secure, and production-hardened logging interface for the entire catalog and inventory backend services.
